title: SDLC Local Config
description: Validates .sdlc/local.json — user-local (gitignored) configuration for sdlc-utilities skills.

reviewSection.description: User-local defaults for the review-sdlc skill.

scope.description: Which changes to include in the review.

receivedReviewSection.description: User-local defaults for the received-review-sdlc skill.

alwaysFixSeverities.description: Severities whose 'will fix' findings bypass the per-finding consent gate. Local-only — must NEVER be set in .sdlc/config.json.

steps.description: Pipeline steps to run. Replaces legacy preset/skip fields.

quick.description: Optional shortened step list activated by --quick. When set, /ship-sdlc --quick uses this list instead of steps[]. Unset means --quick is not available for this project. See R-quick-1.

bump.description: Version bump level. Accepts `major|minor|patch` or any pre-release label matching `^[a-z][a-z0-9]*$` (e.g., `rc`, `beta`, `alpha`). Label values are forwarded verbatim to version-sdlc, where they are interpreted as `--bump patch --pre <label>`.

draft.description: Open the pull request as a draft.

reviewThreshold.description: Minimum severity level that blocks the pipeline.

rebase.description: Whether to rebase before shipping, or prompt the user.

verifyPipelineTimeout.description: Maximum seconds verify-pipeline polls before giving up with a warning. (R57)

verifyPipelineMaxIterations.description: Maximum analyze-fix-recheck iterations before verify-pipeline emits a warning and proceeds. (R47, R57)

awaitRemoteReviewTimeout.description: Maximum seconds await-remote-review polls before giving up with a warning. (R57)

awaitRemoteReviewers.description: Logins (case-insensitive) whose reviews satisfy await-remote-review. When the login is `copilot`, the reviewer must also be a Bot. (R56, R57)

workspaceSection.description: User-local workspace preferences. Workspace itself is auto-detected (branch/continue) — this section only carries branch-name derivation knobs consumed by lib/branch-name.js. The former worktree-placement and mode keys are removed (workspace is no longer user-selectable; fixes #378, #379).

branch.description: Branch-name derivation knobs consumed by lib/branch-name.js. Mirrors workspace.worktree shape. Drives config-driven branch naming in both ship-sdlc pre-execute block and execute-plan-sdlc standalone Step 1 (fixes #378, #379).

template.description: Branch name template. Supported placeholders: {type} (mapped via typeMap), {slug} (truncated to slugMaxLength), {issue} (optional ticket key, empty string when not provided), {date} (YYYYMMDD in local tz). Unknown placeholders throw.

slugMaxLength.description: Maximum length of the slug segment before substitution into the template.

typeMap.description: Maps logical plan type to branch prefix. Merged with defaults: {feature:'feat', bugfix:'fix', chore:'chore', docs:'docs', refactor:'refactor'}. Override specific keys to customise prefixes.

version.description: Schema version of this local config file. Current version is 2; v1 files (no version field, with ship.preset/ship.skip) are auto-migrated on read.
